title: Filter Pane Header with Row Count, Total Population, and Clear Filters Link
story: As a DataTools Pro user filtering reports, I want to see how many results match my filters out of the total population, with a quick way to clear all filters, so that I understand the scope of my filtered view.
description:
Adds a filter pane header showing the filtered row count versus total data population, plus a "Clear Filters" hyperlink. Also reduces the height of section headers to match other tabs and minimize wasted vertical space.

Example display: "Showing 42 of 1,250 | Clear Filters"

Waqar added the result count functionality, and Balaji handled the UI layout and clear filters implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Filter pane displays filtered row count and total population
Clear Filters hyperlink resets all active filters
Section header height is reduced to match other tabs
Counts update dynamically as filters are applied or removed
ux_changes: Added a filter metadata header showing 'X of Y' count with a Clear Filters link. Reduced section header height for consistency.
middleware_changes: Added server-side result count calculation to support filtered vs. total population display.
implementation_notes: Waqar implemented the result count functionality. Balaji handled the UI. Space constraints in the filter pane required layout adjustments. Clear filter was implemented as a hyperlink.
comment_summary: Waqar added result count functionality. Balaji reported space constraints for displaying content. Implemented clear filters as a link per discussion.
